requirements.title: 纯文本任务上下文
requirements.description: todo 使用可选纯文本 context，不再解析 text/file/skill 混合引用。
requirements.ref: grill-report.md#scope-revision-r1-context-改为纯文本skill-改为独立可空配置

requirements.title: 独立可空 skill 配置
requirements.description: todo 使用 skill?: { name: string, args?: string }，并支持 update 时以 null 清除。

requirements.title: Pi 原生 skill loader
requirements.description: 实现独立 loader 模块，复用 Pi resource discovery，不依赖 Maestro/Ralph runtime。
requirements.ref: grill-report.md#scope-revision-r2-当前不集成-ralph未来以-todo-替代-pi-ralph-控制

requirements.title: Pi skill-config 双作用域
requirements.description: 全局与项目 skill-config 按 skill/param 合并，项目覆盖全局，task args 最后覆盖。

requirements.title: 安全的 next 状态转换
requirements.description: skill 加载和 prompt 预算检查成功后才允许任务进入 in_progress。
requirements.ref: grill-report.md#q32-source-解析失败时的状态转换

constraints.constraint: todo public contract MUST expose context as optional plain text and MUST remove public injection, load, refs, and inject inputs.
constraints.rationale: The current schema and runtime have multiple conflicting entry points.

constraints.constraint: todo MUST expose one optional skill object with name and optional args, and MUST NOT expose a separate skillArgs field.
constraints.rationale: One nested field keeps the top-level tool schema small while retaining per-task parameters.

constraints.constraint: On update, omitted context or skill MUST preserve the stored value; empty context MUST clear context; null skill MUST clear skill.
constraints.rationale: Explicit empty values must be distinguishable from omitted fields.

constraints.constraint: Goal lifecycle MUST remain independent, and todo next SHOULD inject the active goal automatically.
constraints.rationale: Goal is durable execution intent, not an optional content source.

constraints.constraint: todo MUST NOT provide generic file injection; skill files MUST be loaded through required reading and other files remain agent-managed.
constraints.rationale: A third content path would undo the field simplification.
constraints.ref: grill-report.md#q15-是否保留通用-file-注入能力

constraints.constraint: The skill loader MUST be an independent Pi-native module and MUST NOT import or call D:/maestro2 Ralph modules.
constraints.rationale: Ralph is a design reference only; Pi todo is the future control primitive.
constraints.ref: grill-report.md#scope-revision-r2-当前不集成-ralph未来以-todo-替代-pi-ralph-控制

constraints.constraint: Skill discovery MUST reuse Pi DefaultResourceLoader results instead of maintaining custom directory scanning.
constraints.rationale: The host already handles project, global, ancestor, and package skill sources.

constraints.constraint: The loader MUST merge ~/.pi/agent/skill-config.json and {cwd}/.pi/skill-config.json by skill and parameter, with project values taking precedence.
constraints.rationale: This provides Pi-native global defaults with project overrides.

constraints.constraint: Skill discovery and full content loading MUST be deferred to next; create and update MUST validate only the input shape.
constraints.rationale: The user explicitly selected late binding and rejected Ralph-specific stored command paths.

constraints.constraint: next MUST finish skill loading and budget validation before changing task state; failure MUST keep the task pending.
constraints.rationale: The current implementation advances state before loader errors are known.
constraints.ref: grill-report.md#q32-source-解析失败时的状态转换

constraints.constraint: Skill discovery MUST be cached per session; a miss or explicit refresh MAY trigger one reload and MUST NOT retry indefinitely.
constraints.rationale: Reloading every next would rescan all Pi resources for long task chains.

constraints.constraint: Context, skill body, and required reading MUST have configurable file and total budgets; overflow MUST fail without silent truncation.
constraints.rationale: Truncating instructions can remove safety or completion constraints.

domain.problem_statement: Simplify the Pi todo tool into a small task-control contract with plain text context and an optional native skill execution configuration, while making todo the future primitive for Pi Ralph-style orchestration.

terminology.definition: Optional plain text execution context stored on a todo task.
Optional todo configuration object containing a skill name and optional task arguments.
Independent Pi-native module that discovers and loads skill instructions for todo next.
Pi-native global and project per-skill default parameter configuration.
Files declared by a skill that must be loaded before execution.
The active goal text injected independently by todo next.

domain.audience: Pi extension maintainers and workflow authors

non_goals.title: Current Ralph integration
non_goals.rationale: D:/maestro2 is a design reference only; no runtime coupling is allowed.
non_goals.ref: grill-report.md#scope-revision-r2-当前不集成-ralph未来以-todo-替代-pi-ralph-控制

non_goals.title: Generic file injection
non_goals.rationale: Files are handled by skill required reading or by the executing agent.
non_goals.ref: grill-report.md#q15-是否保留通用-file-注入能力

non_goals.title: Future Pi Ralph migration
non_goals.rationale: Todo must enable the migration, but the migration itself is deferred.
non_goals.ref: grill-report.md#scope-revision-r2-当前不集成-ralph未来以-todo-替代-pi-ralph-控制

insights.summary: The public TypeBox schema still exposes old fields that the runtime no longer consumes.
The footer widget still reads the legacy owner, decision, and injection shape.
Pi already provides DefaultResourceLoader for native skill discovery, so custom path scanning is unnecessary.
The current next implementation advances task state before content loading can fail.
insights.ref: grill-report.md#q32-source-解析失败时的状态转换

open_questions.question: What are the default per-file and total prompt budgets, and where are they configured?
How are skill.args parsed and merged precisely with skill-config.params?
How are legacy persisted todo fields migrated to context and skill?
